title: [ExportVerilog] Don't generate `automatic variable` if the tool doesn't support it

features.name: automatic logic variable inside always block
features.description: Code should include an automatic logic declaration inside an always block that uses procedural assignment
features.snippet: always @(posedge clock) begin automatic logic _T; _T = a & b; end

features.name: automatic logic variable with multiple uses in always block
features.description: Code should include an automatic logic declaration inside an always block where the variable is used multiple times in conditional expressions
features.snippet: always @(posedge clock) begin automatic logic _T; _T = a & b; opcode <= _T ? x : opcode; param <= _T ? y : param; end

features.name: module-level logic declaration used inside always block
features.description: Code should include a module-level logic declaration used inside an always block as an alternative to automatic logic
features.snippet: logic _T; always @(posedge clock) begin _T = a & b; opcode <= _T ? x : opcode; end
